category_sources: Official KhronosGroup SPIRV-Cross repository describes it as a tool for parsing and converting SPIR-V to other shader languages.
source_facts.description says SPIRV-Cross performs reflection and disassembles SPIR-V.
display_name_sources: Official repository README uses the SPIRV-Cross name.
source_facts.homepage is the official KhronosGroup/SPIRV-Cross repository.
docs_sources: Official KhronosGroup SPIRV-Cross GitHub wiki is an official documentation surface.
Official KhronosGroup SPIRV-Cross README is the main documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/KhronosGroup/SPIRV-Cross; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official repository README lists conversion to GLSL, MSL, HLSL, JSON reflection, and Vulkan pipeline layout support.
source_facts.description mentions reflection and disassembling SPIR-V.
